title: Epic: Agentic visit follow-up system
description: Post-visit automation with HITL using Anthropic Claude SDK. Ingest visit context → extract action items → plan tasks with HITL gates → execute autonomously → hand off for human review. Next.js 15 UI, PostgreSQL persistence, Docker Compose deployment.
close_reason: All 7 child tasks implemented and closed. Full pipeline: Ingest→Extract→Plan→Act→Handoff. 12 tests passing.

title: Act phase - multi-turn tool execution
description: executeAgentTasks() loop: fetch ready_to_run tasks, call Claude with tools, dispatch tool_use blocks to handlers, save artifacts. 5 tools: draft_email, research_question, create_followup_task, check_expense, generate_proposal_outline. Files: src/agent/core.ts:executeAgentTasks(), src/agent/toolHandlers.ts, src/agent/tools.ts
close_reason: Fully implemented: executeAgentTasks() multi-turn loop with tool dispatch, 5 tool handlers, artifact saving

title: Ingest→Extract→Plan pipeline
description: sendMessage visit context to Claude (no tools), parse JSON from <result> tags, classify extracted items as agent/human/approval, create tasks with appropriate state. Files: src/agent/core.ts:runAgent(), src/agent/client.ts
close_reason: Fully implemented: runAgent() sends visit context to Claude, parses JSON from <result> tags, classifies extracted items, creates tasks

title: Tests & quality gates
description: 12 vitest tests (state classification, tool format, query shapes, API integration), Playwright E2E test, vitest.config.ts, playwright.config.ts
close_reason: Fully implemented: 12 vitest tests passing, Playwright E2E spec, vitest.config.ts, playwright.config.ts

title: Docker Compose & deployment
description: Multi-stage Next.js Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml with app+postgres, .env.example, health check headers. File: Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml
close_reason: Fully implemented: Multi-stage Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml with postgres, .env.example

title: Web UI - dashboard & visit detail
description: Dashboard (/) with visit cards + latest run status badges. Visit detail (/visits/[id]) with context card, AgentRunPanel, TaskList with approve/reject, expandable artifacts. Files: src/app/page.tsx, visits/[id]/page.tsx, components/
close_reason: Fully implemented: Dashboard at /, visit detail at /visits/[id], AgentRunPanel, TaskList, HITLModal

title: PostgreSQL persistence & API routes
description: Schema: visits, agent_runs, agent_tasks, artifacts (4 tables + 3 indexes). 11 CRUD queries. 6 API routes. Files: src/data/migrate.ts, queries.ts, seed.ts, src/app/api/
close_reason: Fully implemented: 4 tables + 3 indexes, 11 CRUD queries, 6 API routes

title: HITL task state machine
description: States: pending_human, ready_to_run, blocked, done. Approve→creates ready_to_run sub-task + immediate execution. Reject→marks done + rejection artifact. Files: src/agent/core.ts:resolveHITL(), src/components/HITLModal.tsx, src/components/TaskList.tsx
close_reason: Fully implemented: pending_human/ready_to_run/blocked/done states, HITLModal with approve/reject, approved tasks execute immediately
